Additionally, the contract uses lastInvestor.send(jackpot) and owner.send(this.balance-1 ether) without checking the return value, which matches the UNCHECKED_CALL vulnerability pattern. This can cause silent failures in fund transfers, leading to locked funds or inconsistent state. The combination of these issues, especially with the external calls not being checked, makes the contract vulnerable to attacks such as the one demonstrated by the Attacker contract.
